Welcome

Orange Electric Gate Builders & Repair

Orange Electric Gate Builders & Repair has been serving Long Beach and the surrounding region with premium fence contractor services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Long Beach Trusts Orange Electric Gate Builders & Repair

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
